project.name: codexcli
project.description: Persistent, structured knowledge store for software projects. CLI + MCP server. Agents bootstrap full project context in one call instead of re-exploring the codebase.
project.vision: Eliminate repetitive codebase exploration by AI agents. Every session starts with full context. Every insight gets stored for the next session. Token savings compound over time.

commands.release: git push origin main && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git tag "v$VERSION" && git push origin "v$VERSION" && echo "🚀 Released v$VERSION"
commands.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm test

arch.storage: Unified data.json: { entries, aliases, confirm, _meta }. Project-scoped at .codexcli.json, global at ~/.codexcli/data.json.
arch.store: src/store.ts — ScopedStore with mtime caching, auto-migration from old format, atomic writes (tmp file + rename with file locking).
arch.scope: Three scopes: project, global, auto. Auto uses project if .codexcli.json exists. Single-key lookups fall through project -> global.
arch.mcp: 20 tools via @modelcontextprotocol/sdk in src/mcp-server.ts. All tools accept optional scope param. Telemetry + audit auto-logged per call.
arch.cli: Commander.js in src/index.ts. Every command has a short alias (set/s, get/g, run/r, find/f, etc.).
arch.binary: Production: ccli (Node.js SEA binary). Dev: cclid (npm-linked). getBinaryName() auto-detects — never hardcode.
arch.interpolation: ${key} value refs, $(key) exec refs, ${key:-default} fallbacks, ${key:?error} required checks. Recursive with circular-ref detection. --raw skips interpolation.
arch.telemetry: JSONL append log at ~/.codexcli/telemetry.jsonl. Tracks tool, session, op type, namespace, source (mcp/cli), scope (project/global). codex_stats computes trending metrics.
arch.staleness: _meta timestamps per key, auto-updated on write. ccli stale / codex_stale surfaces old entries. codex_context shows age tags >30d.
arch.lint: Validates entries against recommended namespace schema. Custom namespaces via _schema.namespaces in .codexcli.json.
arch.llmInstructions: Built-in default instructions + customizable via system.llm.instructions. ccli config llm-instructions to view/edit.
arch.scaffold: ccli init --scaffold detects package.json/go.mod/pyproject.toml/Cargo.toml and auto-populates project + commands namespaces. Idempotent.
arch.audit: Full audit log at ~/.codexcli/audit.jsonl. Captures before/after values, success/fail, scope, agent identity, sanitized params. codex_audit MCP tool + ccli audit CLI command to query. Encrypted values masked, passwords redacted.

conventions.types: tsconfig has exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true — optional interface fields need | undefined
conventions.output: All user-facing text uses getBinaryName() — never hardcode ccli
conventions.tests: Vitest with globals. Unit tests mock fs/store. Integration tests use temp dirs via CODEX_DATA_DIR.
conventions.atomicWrites: All file writes use saveJsonSorted -> withFileLock -> atomicWriteFileSync (tmp file + rename)
conventions.debug: Always use process.env.DEBUG === 'true' (strict equality). Never use truthy check.

context.migration: Auto-migrates old 3-file format to unified data.json on first access. Old files renamed to .backup.
context.configSeparate: config.json is separate from data.json — user preferences, not project data
context.mcpCwd: MCP server needs --cwd or CODEX_PROJECT_DIR to find project files — its cwd may differ from project root
context.testDataLeaks: CODEX_DATA_DIR only redirects global store. If .codexcli.json exists in cwd, test writes hit the project store. Running npm test or commands.check will re-add test.* and search.test.* entries — always clean .codexcli.json before committing.
context.devWorkflow: Dev: npm run dev:watch for auto-rebuild. Test: npm test. Use cclid/cclid-mcp for local testing. PR via GitHub, release via git tag triggering CI.
context.aliasCollision: Alias always wins in resolveKey — no way to bypass and access an entry with the same name as an alias. Known limitation.
context.completionArgTypes: dataKey: entries+aliases with labels. dataKeyOnly: entries only. dataKeyPrefix: truncated to next dot segment. aliasName: aliases only, no labels.

files.entry: src/index.ts — CLI entry point, Commander.js setup, all command registration, CLI-side audit logging
files.mcp: src/mcp-server.ts — MCP server, 20 tools, audit/telemetry wrapper, scope resolution
files.store: src/store.ts — ScopedStore class, mtime caching, auto-migration, meta timestamps, atomic writes via file locking
files.storage: src/storage.ts — low-level getValue/setValue/getEntriesFlat, scope fallthrough (project->global), alias resolution
files.entries: src/commands/entries.ts — get/set/run/remove command handlers, interpolation integration, clipboard support
files.formatting: src/formatting.ts — display formatting for get output, tree/flat views, color, truncation
files.completions: src/completions.ts — zsh tab completion, CLI_TREE definition, generateZshScript(), arg type handlers
files.interpolate: src/utils/interpolate.ts — ${key} value refs, $(key) exec refs, defaults, required checks, circular detection
files.audit: src/utils/audit.ts — logAudit, loadAuditLog, queryAuditLog, sanitizeValue/Params, JSONL append
files.telemetry: src/utils/telemetry.ts — logToolCall, computeStats, JSONL telemetry at ~/.codexcli/telemetry.jsonl
files.types: src/types.ts — shared interfaces: DataStore, Scope, AliasMap, ConfirmMap, StoreMeta
files.config: src/config.ts — user config (config.json), separate from data store, preferences like pager/color
